name: Scrambled Egg Taco

source.author: Various
source.chapter: Welcome to the World of Mexican Taco Breakfast Recipes

method: Cook the egg and keep stirring.
Add the rest of the ingredients and warm the corn tortillas.
Arrange the scrambled egg in the tortillas.
Your dish is ready to be served.

category.chapter: Welcome to the World of Mexican Taco Breakfast Recipes
